formulas.name: Molecular Weight of Monosaccharides
formulas.formula: (2 × Atomic Mass of C) + (16 × Atomic Mass of O) + (Atomic Mass of H)
formulas.variables: Atomic Mass of C, Atomic Mass of O, Atomic Mass of H

formulas.name: Molecular Weight of Amino Acids
formulas.formula: (C × Atomic Mass of C) + (H × Atomic Mass of H) + (O × Atomic Mass of O) + (N × Atomic Mass of N)
formulas.variables: Atomic Mass of C, Atomic Mass of H, Atomic Mass of O, Atomic Mass of N

formulas.name: Molecular Weight of Nucleotides
formulas.formula: (C × Atomic Mass of C) + (H × Atomic Mass of H) + (O × Atomic Mass of O) + (N × Atomic Mass of N) + (P × Atomic Mass of P) + (O × Atomic Mass of O)
formulas.variables: Atomic Mass of C, Atomic Mass of H, Atomic Mass of O, Atomic Mass of N, Atomic Mass of P

formulas.name: Mass Percentage of Solute
formulas.formula: % w/w = (Mass of Solute / Total Mass of Solution) × 100
formulas.variables: Mass of Solute, Total Mass of Solution

formulas.name: Percentage Composition of a Biomolecule
formulas.formula: % Composition = (Mass of Component / Molecular Weight of Biomolecule) × 100
formulas.variables: Mass of Component, Molecular Weight of Biomolecule

formulas.name: Specific Rotation of a Compound
formulas.formula: [α] = (Observed Rotation / Path Length in cm) × (100 / Concentration in g/ml)
formulas.variables: Observed Rotation, Path Length in cm, Concentration in g/ml
formulas.notes: Used to determine the optical purity of a compound

formulas.name: Gibbs Free Energy Change for a Reaction
formulas.notes: Used to determine the spontaneity of a reaction
